nl_query: Show the complete moderation audit trail for each script that received moderation: the rule type, parameters, original total, adjusted total, mark difference, and the name of the COE user who applied it, ordered by application date.
failed_sql: SELECT mr.rule_type, mr.parameters, ma.original_total, ma.adjusted_total, (ma.adjusted_total - ma.original_total) AS mark_difference, au.display_name AS coe_app_user_name, ma.applied_at FROM moderation_application ma JOIN moderation_rule mr ON mr.id = ma.moderation_rule_id JOIN app_user au ON au.id = ma.applied_by WHERE ma.script_id IN (SELECT script_id FROM answer_script WHERE evaluation_status = 'FROZEN' AND block_status = 'NONE') ORDER BY ma.applied_at
